headline: Facebook’s new AI Mode search gets its info from public posts
summary: Meta is rolling out a new 'AI Mode' for Facebook search. This AI will generate results using information from public Facebook posts. It's part of a broader launch of new AI features, including photo presets.

headline: Xbox is closing down Hellblade creator Ninja Theory
summary: Xbox is reportedly closing Ninja Theory, the studio behind the Hellblade series. Staffers were informed, but hope for a buyer to emerge. This closure is part of broader cuts impacting 'several' Xbox studios.

headline: Fox wants to take over your TV — and the tech inside it
summary: Fox is acquiring Roku in a massive $22 billion deal. This acquisition aims to give Fox control over the streaming portal in over 100 million homes. The deal could reshape how viewers access services like Netflix and Disney Plus.

headline: Amazon’s Smart Thermostat is on sale for just $58
summary: The Amazon Smart Thermostat is currently on sale for $57.99. This deal is part of Amazon's early Prime Day promotions. It's the lowest price seen since Black Friday, offering savings on cooling costs.

headline: The Baseus 20,000mAh 100W Power Bank With Dual USB-C Cables Drops to Just $38.99
summary: A Baseus 20,000mAh 100W Power Bank is now available for only $38.99. It features dual USB-C cables for versatile charging. The power bank offers high capacity and output at an affordable price.

headline: The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum Adds Anya Taylor-Joy to Its Cast
summary: Anya Taylor-Joy joins the cast of 'The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum.' She will portray a new elf character named Seren. The 'Queen's Gambit' star expands the ensemble for the upcoming film.

headline: Treyarch Head Mark Gordon Steps Down from Call of Duty Studio
summary: Treyarch studio head Mark Gordon is leaving the company. He departs after 22 years with the Call of Duty studio. His departure marks a significant leadership change for the developer.

headline: Ninja Theory and Double Fine Also Reportedly Under Threat of Closure as Xbox Studios Fight for Survival
summary: Hellblade developer Ninja Theory and Psychonauts developer Double Fine face potential closure. These studios are among several impacted by significant cuts to Xbox's business. The report highlights a struggle for survival among various Microsoft-owned gaming studios.

headline: Russia was behind arson attacks targeting PM, BBC reveals
summary: BBC investigation reveals Russia directed arson attacks against the UK Prime Minister. Evidence shows Russia also stoked tensions with fake far-right and Muslim groups. The findings point to a coordinated campaign of destabilization.

headline: Under-16s to be banned from TikTok, YouTube and other social media by next spring, Starmer says
summary: UK PM Starmer announced a ban on social media for under-16s. Sites like TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram will be inaccessible to millions of children. The ban is projected to be implemented by next spring.

headline: Social media ban - bold and blunt, but no silver bullet
summary: The proposed social media ban for under-16s is a significant policy change. BBC's technology editor describes it as 'bold and blunt.' However, it's cautioned not to be a complete solution to online youth issues.

headline: Teacher guilty of sexually abusing and murdering adopted baby
summary: A teacher, Jamie Varley, has been found guilty of horrific crimes. He sexually abused and murdered his adopted baby, Preston Davey. The baby died after months of severe physical and sexual abuse.
